meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kits: Scale Your Freelance Agency Fast
content.seo_description: Break free from basic app builds. Learn how to use SaaS starter kits with Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver professional-grade software in record time.
content.answer_block: Stop building from scratch. By leveraging a high-performance SaaS starter kit, you unify authentication, billing, and database architecture into a single, repeatable foundation. Integrate Antigravity for automated boilerplate generation and use Claude Code to accelerate feature implementation, allowing you to ship production-ready SaaS products in days, not months.
content.intro:
You’re trapped in the 'CRUD cycle'—building the same user authentication, billing flows, and database schemas for every single client. While your competitors are scaling, you’re drowning in repetitive boilerplate, burning billable hours on foundational work that provides zero unique value to your clients. The difference between a struggling freelancer and a high-ticket software architect isn't just coding skill; it's the mastery of leverage.

Today, we pivot. We are moving beyond basic app development into the realm of high-velocity engineering. By combining the structural power of a SaaS starter kit with the autonomous coding capabilities of Antigravity and Claude Code, you will transform your workflow from manual labor to an automated assembly line. Prepare to ship faster, charge more, and reclaim your time.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize a production-grade foundation. We avoid the 'blank slate' trap by pulling a battle-tested repository that includes Auth, Stripe, and PostgreSQL pre-configured.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Next.js starter kit template. Include integrated Supabase auth, Stripe subscription billing, and Tailwind CSS configuration.

steps.title: Define Schema Integrity
steps.description: Standardize your data layer. Use AI to map out your database schema to ensure it complies with your starter kit's existing ORM patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current schema.prisma file and generate the necessary User, Subscription, and Project models to support a multi-tenant SaaS application.

steps.title: Automate Endpoint Logic
steps.description: Reduce manual API development. We use the starter kit's middleware to handle protected routes, letting the AI generate the business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure API route handler for processing workspace invites. Ensure it validates user session tokens and checks for administrative permissions.

steps.title: Implement UI Components
steps.description: Ensure design consistency. Leverage the starter kit's design system to build out the dashboard views without writing raw CSS.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive data table component for the dashboard that fetches from the 'projects' table and includes sorting and search functionality.

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Streamline the CI/CD pipeline. Ensure your infrastructure is ready for production scaling immediately upon completion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow file that runs linting, type-checking, and unit tests on every pull request to the main branch.

pro_tips: Always maintain a private 'Golden Boilerplate' repository that you keep updated with the latest dependency security patches.
Use Claude Code in 'agent' mode for refactoring legacy code blocks to match your new starter kit's architecture.
Implement feature flags early; it allows you to ship unfinished code to production safely while testing specific modules with clients.
Standardize your environment variables across projects to ensure your deployment scripts never fail on server setup.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation automatically; clients pay 20% more for professional docs included in the handover.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, iterate by building a 'Component Library' of your own bespoke UI elements to further reduce your development time on future client projects.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading time for money. Build a scalable system that works for you, not the other way around. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
